parameters.jsCode:
const c = $('Config').first().json;
const competitionMap = {
  78:  c.comp_bundesliga,
  81:  c.comp_dfb,
  2:   c.comp_cl,
  667: c.comp_friendlies
};

return $input.all().flatMap(item => {
  if (!item.json.response?.length) return [];
  return item.json.response.map(f => ({
    json: {
      kickoff: f.fixture.date,
      isKickOffConfirmed: true,
      localizedTitle: null,
      matchPhase: null,
      title: null,
      id: f.fixture.id,
      sport: "Football",
      seasonId: c.season_id,
      competitionId: competitionMap[f.league.id] ?? null,
      teamHomeId: f.teams.home.id,
      teamAwayId: f.teams.away.id,
      teamHomeScore: f.goals.home ?? 0,
      teamAwayScore: f.goals.away ?? 0,
      matchday: parseInt(f.league.round.match(/\d+/)?.[0]) || null,
      venue: f.fixture.venue.name ?? null,
      city: f.fixture.venue.city ?? null,
      matchdayTitle: null,
      numberOfGoalScorers: null,
      teamHomeJersey: null,
      teamAwayJersey: null,
      broadcasts: [],
      numberOfViewers: null,
      matchState: f.fixture.status.short === "FT" ? "FullTime" :
                  f.fixture.status.short === "1H" || f.fixture.status.short === "2H" ||
                  f.fixture.status.short === "HT" || f.fixture.status.short === "ET" ? "Live" :
                  f.fixture.status.short === "PST" ? "Postponed" :
                  f.fixture.status.short === "CANC" ? "Cancelled" :
                  f.fixture.status.short === "TBD" ? "ToBeConfirmed" :
                  f.fixture.status.short === "INT" ? "Interrupted" : "PreMatch",
      startsAt: f.fixture.date,
      endsAt: null,
      isScheduled: true
    }
  }));
});

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "kickoff": {{ $json.kickoff ? `"${$json.kickoff}"` : 'null' }},
  "isKickOffConfirmed": {{ $json.isKickOffConfirmed }},
  "localizedTitle": null,
  "matchPhase": null,
  "title": null,
  "id": {{ $json.id }},
  "sport": "{{ $json.sport }}",
  "seasonId": {{ $json.seasonId }},
  "competitionId": {{ $json.competitionId }},
  "teamHomeId": {{ $json.teamHomeId }},
  "teamAwayId": {{ $json.teamAwayId }},
  "teamHomeScore": {{ $json.teamHomeScore }},
  "teamAwayScore": {{ $json.teamAwayScore }},
  "matchday": {{ $json.matchday }},
  "venue": {{ $json.venue ? `"${$json.venue}"` : 'null' }},
  "city": {{ $json.city ? `"${$json.city}"` : 'null' }},
  "matchdayTitle": null,
  "numberOfGoalScorers": null,
  "teamHomeJersey": null,
  "teamAwayJersey": null,
  "broadcasts": [],
  "numberOfViewers": null,
  "matchState": "{{ $json.matchState }}",
  "startsAt": "{{ $json.startsAt }}",
  "endsAt": null,
  "isScheduled": {{ $json.isScheduled }}
}
